creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback


Hello, 

Thanks for your report! 

But could you please explain the different patches? 

It does'nt apply cleanly: 

===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for rxvt-unicode-9.12 
/usr/bin/patch -d /usr/ports/x11/rxvt-unicode/work/rxvt-unicode-9.12 --forward --quiet -E -p0 --batch -V simple --suffix .orig < /usr/ports/x11/rxvt-unicode/files/extra-patch-imlocale 
Ignoring previously applied (or reversed) patch. 
1 out of 1 hunks ignored--saving rejects to src/encoding.h.rej 
*** Error code 1 

and I'm not sure to understand what you wanted to do. 

Best regards, 
--  
Th. Thomas.
